T/w1
Precompute coefficients of Temme's asymptotic expansion for gammainc.
This takes about 8 hours to run on a 2.3 GHz Macbook Pro with 4GB ram.
Sources:
[1] NIST, "Digital Library of Mathematical Functions",
    https://dlmf.nist.gov/
lagrange_inversionc
a_k from DLMF 5.11.6
sqrt
range
append)
L/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/scipy/special/_precompute/gammainc_asy.py
	compute_a
g_k from DLMF 5.11.3/5.11.5r
<listcomp>#
compute_g.<locals>.<listcomp>)
	compute_g 
z6Function from DLMF 8.12.1 shifted to be centered at 0.r
log)
lamr
eta'
alpha_n from DLMF 8.12.13r
taylorr
coeffsr
compute_alpha1
d_{k, n} from DLMF 8.12.12r
alphar
	compute_d7

#define IGAM_H
#define K {}
#define N {}

#endif
